title: Turn spare time into setup jobs
body: If no high-value play is guaranteed and your camps are not yet due, spare time should still produce something. Good spare-time jobs include warding enemy camps, removing vision, checking lane conditions, denying blast cone access, or helping a wave only when that wave fix is clearly worth more than the alternative.
actionables: When you catch yourself waiting for a spawn, ask which setup job creates the most information in the next 20 seconds.
Use spare time to ward enemy camps or sweep a key entrance rather than recalling too early.
Only use spare time on a lane wave if that wave state is clearly more valuable than vision or enemy camp information.

source.title: Give Me 40 Minutes To Make You INSANE At Jungle - Diamond Jungle Coaching
source.notes: Derived from Leo's repeated examples of warding camps, sweeping, blast cone denial, and wave fixes during dead windows.
